metadata.description: Politia dynamic string translation interpolation and layout fidelity configuration roadmap.

rtl_bidi_isolation.strategy: Wrap all dynamic variables in unicode direction marks or HTML <bdi> tag to prevent layout distortion from mixed LTR/RTL text.
rtl_bidi_isolation.coptic_amharic_greek_isolation: Ensure target fonts are isolated using styling overrides so standard English strings in translations use Inter, while native strings use Noto/Custom fonts.

layout_fidelity_thresholds.text_wrapping: Use clamp() or responsive flex/grid layouts with flat color structures to handle variable translations gracefully (e.g., German/Amharic can be 30-40% longer than English).

badge.description: Top highlight badge above main headline

title.ltr_default: A Sanctuary for Liturgical and Community Life

subtitle.ltr_default: Politia weaves together the timeless teachings of the Coptic Orthodox Church, sacred Agpeya prayers, parish coordination, and traditional hymns into a single quiet space.
subtitle.rtl_default: تجمع بوليتيا بين التعاليم الخالدة للكنيسة القبطية الأرثوذكسية، صلوات الأجبية المقدسة، تنسيق الرعاية، والألحان التراثية في مساحة هادئة واحدة.

card_title_template.description: Dynamic layout check displaying localized feature categories

category.rendering_guideline: Wrap placeholder in <bdi> tag to maintain correct reading direction when language of category differs from current direction.

welcome_message.description: Greeting shown upon successful form submission
welcome_message.ltr_default: Peace be with you, {name}. A servant from our community will contact you at {email} shortly.
welcome_message.rtl_default: سلام الرب معك يا {name}. سيتواصل معك أحد الخدام على {email} قريباً.

name.rendering_guideline: Ensure alignment is start-anchored for text inputs to prevent cursor jump on focus.

email.rendering_guideline: Force LTR direction even in RTL layouts using dir='ltr' style rules for raw email addresses.
